title: Smoked Sweet Tunisian Cake
description: A unique and flavorful dessert that combines the sweetness of smoked sugar with the spices of Tunisian cuisine, all wrapped up in a moist almond cake.
instructions: Grease a 9-inch (23cm) round cake pan and set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine almond flour, smoked sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together softened butter, eggs, vanilla extract, cinnamon, ginger, and tunisian spice blend.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until well combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and smooth the top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes.
Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Once cooled, dust with additional smoked sugar if desired.
